commit_subject: Input: ad7879 - add check for read errors in interrupt
notes: Reused features.json/seed.c from prior mc-1-rep1 prep (same input, deterministic stage 1). Initial POC (v2 from rep1) failed verifier-v1 (F2.if=2 vs seed=1, F5.return=12 vs seed=2); regenerated as a slim _buggy-only POC matching seed structural counts exactly (F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=2 F2.if=1). All 3 predicates validated first pass. Final.ql compiled first pass and fires only on ad7879_irq_buggy as expected. Audit poc_regens=1 reflects the one POC redesign; LLM calls counted as 3 (features+poc+plan) since rep1's features/seed were deterministic re-use.
